zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret De Longeville於1320年出生在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾奧爾頓 隆維爾時，她的父親John de Longueville60歲，母親Marguerita de Montagne50歲。她於1350年4月與Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III在英國貝德福爾可爾沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1368年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾可爾沃斯享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Longeville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Longueville-la-Gifart, now Longueville-sur-Scie (Seine-Maritime, France).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret De Longeville was born in 1320, in Orton Longueville, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Longueville, was 60 and her mother, Marguerita de Montagne, was 50. She married Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III in April 1350, in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1368, in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret De Longeville est née en 1320, à Orton Longueville, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Longueville, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Marguerita de Montagne, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III en avril 1350, à Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1368, à Colmworth, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Sie hat im April 1350 in Colmworth, Bedfordshire, England Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret De Longevilleが1320年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアオルトン ロングエヴィルで生まれた時，父John de Longuevilleは60歳，母Marguerita de Montagneは50歳であった。1350年4月にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコルムウオルスでSir Gerard de Braybrooke IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1368年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコルムウオルスで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret De Longeville(이)가 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 오턴 론구에빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Longueville(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerita de Montagne(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1350년 4월 영국 베드퍼드실르 콜워스에서 Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 콜워스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret De Longeville родилась в 1320 г. в местности ортон лонгуевилл, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Longueville было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerita de Montagne, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gerard de Braybrooke III апрель 1350 г. в местности колмворт, бедфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1368 г. в местности колмворт, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.
